expectedIssues: BetRivers Exclusive Games badge shows 0 games
reportedIssues: The “BetRivers Exclusive Games” section shows a badge reading “0 Games,” but multiple game cards are displayed directly below it.

Several horizontally arranged elements are cut off at the right edge, including the “Hot Games” navigation chip and the third game card in multiple rows. The clipping looks abrupt and makes some text/images partially unreadable.
The selected “Home” category pill has an odd orange/blue glow or underline protruding from the bottom, which looks like a rendering artifact.
The hero carousel arrows sit very close to the screen edges, and the right arrow appears partially clipped/overlapping the banner area.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game grid area, cutting off part of the visible content at the bottom of the screen.

expected.reasoning: Reported issue 0 directly describes the BetRivers Exclusive Games badge showing 0 Games despite game cards being displayed below it.
